MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regular calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Valerie Papale. Douglas Alan Holloway representing plaintiff.The Court finds there is a default against Matthew J. Brown ind. and dba Purrfect Auto Service.
